Memory layout template for STM32F7xx firmware, defining RAM and FLASH regions and section placements.

# Purpose
The content defines memory regions and sections for a software project targeting the STM32F769 microcontroller. It specifies the allocation of different types of RAM, including DTCM-RAM and SRAM, and their respective memory addresses and sizes. The configuration uses placeholders for certain memory regions, such as `KERNEL_RAM`, `WORKER_RAM`, and `APP_RAM`, which are defined by external parameters. The file also defines the FLASH memory region and sets up aliases for stack and heap regions. In the `SECTIONS` part, it specifies the layout of the interrupt vector table in the FLASH region and the `.dtcm_bss` section in the DTCM region, ensuring proper alignment and memory allocation for static variables tagged with `DTCM_BSS`.
